Title: TC-TVT-001 Token Provisioning - Valid PAN in Q1 range
Preconditions: Vault created, issuer onboarded, BIN and account ranges configured.
Steps:
1. Send POST request to http://10.88.250.40:40020/tvm/api/tokens/provision
2. Request body: {
  "pan": "6399960312345678",
  "panExpiry": "0327",
  "tokenRequestorId": "99850031692",
  "tokenType": "CLOUD",
  "tokenAssuranceLevel": "3"
}
3. Verify HTTP response code 200/201
4. Validate response body structure and fields
Expected Result: HTTP 200/201, token (13-19 digit Luhn-valid), TAL returned, token expiry within PAN expiry boundary.
